# The Phone Mast Advice Company
> Independent specialist telecom surveyors helping UK landlords with phone mast leases, rent reviews, and lease renewals.

## About
- Company: The Phone Mast Advice Company Ltd (Reg: 13115582)
- Founded by Matt Restall, RICS-qualified surveyor
- 25+ years experience in UK telecoms infrastructure
- Offices: London (W1W 5PF), Bristol (BS9 3BY), Oswestry (SY11 4AD)
- Phone: 01691 791543 | Email: info@phonemastadvice.co.uk

## Services
- Phone Mast Rent Reviews — independent valuation of mast site rental income
- Phone Mast Lease Renewals — negotiation under the Electronic Communications Code
- New Lettings — securing new operator agreements for landowners
- Mast Sales — selling mast lease income streams to investors
- Removal & Redevelopment — managing mast removal for site development
- Electricity Cost Recovery — reclaiming power costs from operators
- Lease Retrievals — recovering lost or misplaced lease documents

## Operators We Handle
Vodafone, O2, EE, Three (Hutchison 3G), CTIL/Cornerstone, On Tower (formerly Arqiva), Cellnex, Airwave Solutions, Wireless Infrastructure Group (WIG)

## Key Legislation
- Electronic Communications Code (Schedule 3A, Communications Act 2003)
- Digital Economy Act 2017 (new Code in force 28 Dec 2017)
- PSTI Act 2022 (Sections 61-64, commenced 7 Apr 2026)
- Landlord and Tenant Act 1954

## Contact
Web: https://phonemastadvice.co.uk
Free Lease Check: https://phonemastadvice.co.uk/free-lease-check
Free Rent Estimate: https://phonemastadvice.co.uk/free-rent-estimate
